measurement: Quency: Escape Queen SOLO re-read - per-shot decomposition to resolve the 2.58x per-hit under-model (base-ATK vs core-rate)
burst: III (Attacker, Water). SOLO => cannot chain to Full Burst; ZERO Full Bursts cast. Entire output is normal SMG fire.
method: COUNTER-RECONCILIATION as arbiter (top-center running DAMAGE counter + reticle ammo counter), not visual popup counting. ffmpeg frame extraction + PIL montage; per-magazine counter deltas over ammo-confirmed 120-round mags.
kitFacts: ammo 120, reload 81f, hitsPerShot 2, normalMult 5.06, coreMult 250 (core ~2.5x normal). Fire rate CONFIRMED 20 rounds/s (ammo decrements exactly 1 per 3 frames @60fps). Kit stacks ATK and 'Hit Rate' over the fight.
videoMeta: portrait metadata 1206x2622 rot -> ffmpeg auto-rotates to landscape 2622x1206, 60fps, 210.6s container. Combat ~v7 to ~v183.

solo.evidence: Battle Records screen: slot 1 = 'Quency: Escap[e]' LV.400 (element Water), slots 2-5 all 'EMPTY SLOT / NO SIGNAL' with 0 damage. All damage is hers.

clock.method: top-right MM:SS countdown from 03:00; fightClock = 180 - countdown. Firing/counter begins ~v7-8 (counter 100,566 at v8). Fight ends ~v183 (counter ~136M by v182).

colourConvention: white = normal non-core hit; orange + chevron icon = crit (~x1.5); red 'CORE HIT' text = core (~2.3-2.5x non-core); orange+red 'CORE HIT' = core+crit. Red circular bursts around boss = impact/muzzle VFX (NOT popups). Rapid fire makes popups OVERLAP and ACCUMULATE - individual reads are unreliable, hence counter-reconciliation.

cumulativeCounter_3s.note: top-center DAMAGE counter (running total), read every 3s. Clean, high confidence.

perShot_nonCore_white.headline: The white (non-core, non-crit) per-hit value = the BASE per-shot. It ramps only modestly over the fight; this is the ATK/base signal (deliverable 3).

early_v15_bossClose.note: single hits ~9.8k; two hits accumulate to ~19,585

perShot_nonCore_white.baseRamp_earlyToLate: ~1.26x (9,800 -> 12,400). Saturates by ~mid-fight; NOT a continuous climb to the end.
perShot_nonCore_white.keyPoint: This ~9.8k->12.4k non-core base is what a naive/current sim per-hit computes. Base ATK is essentially well-modeled (modest 1.26x ramp). The base is NOT the source of the 2.58x gap.

perShot_core_red.headline: Red 'CORE HIT' value ~= 2.3-2.5x the same-time non-core (deliverable 4 confirmed).

early_v15.ratioToNonCore: 27052/9812 = 2.76 (but early cores are delayed within the mag - see coreFraction)

perShot_core_red.note: Core value is nearly FLAT early->late (27,052 -> 27,852, +3%) while non-core ramps 26%; so core/non-core ratio drifts 2.76 -> 2.25. Consistent with coreMult giving ~2.3-2.5x.

perShot_crit_orange.ratioToNonCore: ~1.3-1.6x (nominal x1.5). Scatter due to popup overlap and ATK varying between the sampled crit vs sampled white.

perMagazine_counterDeltas.note: Magazine boundaries found from reload PLATEAUS in the fine counter (81f = 1.35s flat) + ammo counter. 120 rounds/mag confirmed (ammo 120->~0 in 6.0s = 20 rounds/s). Delta / 120 = per-round; /240 = per-hit (hitsPerShot 2).
perMagazine_counterDeltas.perRoundRamp_earlyToLate_close: 54,270 -> 68,800 = ~1.27x (matches the 1.26x non-core base ramp EXACTLY -> the growth over the fight is pure ATK/base scaling, at fixed close range).
perMagazine_counterDeltas.rangeEffect: MID-fight (boss FAR) per-round collapses to ~33,458 (vs ~54k early close, ~68k late close) EVEN THOUGH the non-core popup is HIGHER mid (~12k) than early (~9.8k). SMG range falloff / hit-rate at distance suppresses damage far more than ATK ramp raises it. Her per-round is strongly RANGE/hit-rate modulated.

coreFraction_theKeyOutput.method: counter-reconciliation: ratio of per-round damage to the visible non-core (base) popup value. A round of 2 pure non-core hits would be ~2x the popup; heavy coring pushes it far higher.
coreFraction_theKeyOutput.interpretation: At CLOSE range (early AND late) each round delivers ~5.5x a single non-core base hit = HEAVY coring (per 2-hit round ~2.76x the non-core value; i.e. essentially every hit lands as a CORE HIT, plus crits). At FAR range (mid) the uplift drops to ~2.79x/round (~1.4x/hit) = mostly non-core. So her effective core rate is HIGH at close range and LOW at range - RANGE/HIT-RATE gated, not a simple monotonic time-climb.

withinMagSettle.finding: Right after each reload the rate is LOW then JUMPS ~2.5x once the spray settles onto the core. Early mag A per-0.5s rate: 502 k/s (v15.0-15.5) -> 622 -> 1036 -> 1167 -> 1187 -> 1346 k/s by v18, then steady ~1140 k/s.
withinMagSettle.consequence: The first ~1s after a reload is mostly WHITE non-core popups (caught in the v15.0-15.5 tight montage), THEN heavy red CORE HIT for the rest of the mag. The visual impression 'early=white, late=red' is a within-mag reload-SETTLE transient / dense-popup artifact, NOT a fight-long core-rate climb. COUNTER > visual: the full early mag averages the same 5.5x/round coring as the late mag.

coreFraction_theKeyOutput.climbEarlyToLate: NO material fight-long climb. Close-range coring uplift is ~constant (5.53x early vs 5.51x late). The only large swing is RANGE (mid-fight far = low coring). ATK base ramps 1.26x separately.

answerToTheQuestion.question: Is Quency's 2.58x per-hit under-model from (a) base ATK/per-shot higher than modeled, or (b) coring at a much higher RATE than modeled?
reasoning: The non-core (white) base per-hit is ~9,800 (early) to ~12,400 (late) - a modest 1.26x ATK ramp - and matches what the sim's per-hit computes. Base is well-modeled.

But the ammo-confirmed per-round damage at close range is ~5.5x that non-core base (~2.76x per 2-hit round). This uplift = heavy CORE HITs (red, ~2.3-2.5x non-core) landing at a near-universal rate at close range, plus crits.

2.76x per-hit ~= the reported 2.58x under-model. The gap is composition (coring), not base scaling. The 'Hit Rate -> core rate' hypothesis is SUPPORTED: she cores at a very high effective rate the sim under-credits.
Range/hit-rate modulates it: at far range her coring collapses (per-round drops to ~2.79x base), which likely also contributes to her being a cold outlier and to run-to-run variance.

flags_and_caveats: INSTANCE-COUNT AMBIGUITY: the 5.5x/round uplift slightly EXCEEDS pure-100%-core (2.5x) on exactly 2 hits (which caps at ~5x). Reaching 5.5x requires either core+crit stacking (~100% core + ~20-40% crit) OR >2 effective damage instances per round (multi-hitbox spray on the multi-legged boss, or an additional-damage passive). Popups cannot fully disambiguate instance-count from core-rate. Either way it is NON-BASE (composition), which is what the question needed.
This boss is visually multi-legged (spider mech); SMG spray may hit multiple hitboxes, inflating instances beyond hitsPerShot=2 - relevant to the S2 parser approximation flagged in her override note.
Popup values (non-core/core/crit) carry ~10-15% read error from overlap/accumulation; per-round/per-mag counter deltas are the reliable arbiter.

Boss RANGE moves substantially (close early, far mid, close late). Range falloff dominates the mid-fight damage dip; the sim should capture range/hit-rate modulation of her coring, not a flat core rate.
ZERO Full Bursts (solo Burst III) - confirmed; any prior read reporting ~11-12 FBs was a false positive. Her entire output is normal SMG fire.
